name: Mega City Parkour
short_description: Explore one of the largest and most detailed cyberpunk cities ever created.
detailed_description:
Mega City Parkour is all about exploring a massive Cyberpunk / Sci-Fi city of the future. There is no score, no killing, no quests – only fun exploration.

The detailed center of the city is a little more than 1km2. The surrounding suburbs and industrial areas add an additional 10km2 of explorable area. The city is 100% open and ready to explore immediately.

The player has full control over the weather with 13 weather conditions, as well as the time of day.

You can explore the city with a car, a flying hover-car, ziplines, rope swings, and of course parkour. The parkour abilities include 24 styles of vaulting, mantling, climbing, sliding and, more.

The game requires a good PC to run. With a PC equipped with an RTX-4080 GPU I achieve 50 FPS at 4K resolution on “high” graphics settings, and on a laptop equipped with an RTX-1650Ti GPU I achieve 50 FPS at 1080p resolution on “medium” graphics settings.

The game has instructions in English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, Portuguese, German, French, and Russian.
